name: review
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.paidCc === undefined || (typeof output.result.paidCc === 'number' && output.result.paidCc >= 0 && output.result.paidCc <= 1000000)
_note: bounties.review is the owner-only accept/reject + payout gate. Unknown bounty → 'bounty not found'. Only the owner may review; a non-owner rejects. decision must be 'accept' or 'reject'. On accept the claimant is credited the REAL pool (whole-bounty) or the named milestone reward — paidCc is bounded by the bounty's own configured reward (<=1e6 because create fail-CLOSED guards the reward). No CC is minted beyond the configured pool; a re-review of an already-decided submission rejects (no double payout).
